title: sorbus alnifolia var. lobulata
intro: Sorbus alnifolia var. lobulata, also known as the Korean whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antiviral and anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Sorbus alnifolia var. lobulata, including infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, are used to treat a range of ailments, from fever and cough to digestive issues and skin conditions.
